scripts.build:backend: npm run install:backend && cd backend && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: npm run install:frontend && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.build:local: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build: npm run diag && npm run build:local && git add . && git commit --allow-empty -m "Auto-deploy update" && git push origin main && npm run deploy:firebase && npm run start:backend && npm run monitor:status
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.deploy:render: echo 'Deploy to Render via GitHub integration'
scripts.diag: echo "Diagnostics ready" && cd backend && npx tsx src/scripts/validateSheet.ts
